combined_text: Roger Federer's wife Mirka gives birth to second set of twins "News People Roger Federer's wife Mirka gives birth to second set of twins Their arrival comes after Roger Federer pulled out of the Madrid Open Masters to join Mirka Kashmira Gander @kashmiragander Tuesday 6 May 2014 20:58 BSTClick to follow The Independent Online The Federers pictured during Mirka
